introSection: Apple Coaster is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster.

sections.title: History
sections.content: This roller coaster was seen operating at Barry Island Pleasure Park in August 2015. It operated at the Great Dorset Steam Fair in August 2016.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This is a Wacky Worm with a flat green front, green train, green supports and yellow track. While most Wacky Worm coasters have multiple gentle bumps following the lift hill, this one has a single, downward bump at the center of the flat section following the lift hill.

fullText:
Apple Coaster is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster.

This roller coaster was seen operating at Barry Island Pleasure Park in August 2015. It operated at the Great Dorset Steam Fair in August 2016.

This is a Wacky Worm with a flat green front, green train, green supports and yellow track. While most Wacky Worm coasters have multiple gentle bumps following the lift hill, this one has a single, downward bump at the center of the flat section following the lift hill.
